name: Survey
description: Generic survey / questionnaire: sections, typed questions, reusable templates, a public share link for anonymous responses, and response analytics.

global.initialValue:
{
  "title": "",
  "description": null,
  "kind": "SURVEY",
  "status": "DRAFT",
  "shareToken": null,
  "clientId": null,
  "clientName": null,
  "sections": [],
  "questions": [],
  "responses": [],
  "createdAt": null,
  "publishedAt": null,
  "closedAt": null
}

modules.name: definition
modules.description: Build the survey: title, description, kind, recipient, sections and questions.

operations.name: SET_SURVEY_KIND
operations.description: Mark the survey as a reusable TEMPLATE or a live SURVEY.
operations.template: Mark the survey as a reusable TEMPLATE or a live SURVEY.

operations.name: SET_RECIPIENT
operations.description: Associate the survey with a client/lead (cached name).
operations.template: Associate the survey with a client/lead (cached name).
operations.reducer:
state.clientId = action.input.clientId || null;
state.clientName = action.input.clientName || null;

operations.name: ADD_SECTION
UPDATE_SECTION

errors.name: SectionNotFoundError
errors.description: The referenced section does not exist.

operations.name: DELETE_SECTION
operations.description: Delete a section and its questions.
operations.template: Delete a section and its questions.

operations.name: REORDER_SECTIONS
ADD_QUESTION
operations.description: Add a question to a section.
operations.schema:
input AddQuestionInput {
  id: OID!
  sectionId: OID!
  type: QuestionType!
  title: String!
  helpText: String
  required: Boolean
  options: [AddQuestionOptionInput!]
  ratingScale: AddQuestionRatingScaleInput
  columns: [AddQuestionColumnInput!]
}

input AddQuestionOptionInput {
  id: OID!
  label: String!
}

input AddQuestionRatingScaleInput {
  min: Int!
  max: Int!
  minLabel: String
  maxLabel: String
}

input AddQuestionColumnInput {
  id: OID!
  label: String!
  type: GridColumnType!
  options: [AddQuestionOptionInput!]
}
operations.template: Add a question to a section.

operations.name: UPDATE_QUESTION
operations.description: Replace a question's type/title/config (id and section unchanged).
operations.template: Replace a question's type/title/config (id and section unchanged).

errors.name: QuestionNotFoundError
errors.description: The referenced question does not exist.

operations.name: DELETE_QUESTION
MOVE_QUESTION
operations.description: Reassign a question to a different section.
operations.template: Reassign a question to a different section.

operations.name: REORDER_QUESTIONS
operations.description: Reorder questions by id (flat order across sections).
operations.template: Reorder questions by id (flat order across sections).

modules.name: publishing
modules.description: Publish, close, reopen and manage the public share link.

operations.name: PUBLISH_SURVEY
operations.description: Publish the survey: open it for responses and store the share token.
operations.template: Publish the survey: open it for responses and store the share token.

errors.name: CannotPublishTemplateError
errors.description: A survey marked as a template cannot be published or reopened.

operations.name: CLOSE_SURVEY
operations.description: Close the survey: stop accepting responses.
operations.template: Close the survey: stop accepting responses.

operations.name: REOPEN_SURVEY
REGENERATE_SHARE_TOKEN
operations.description: Rotate the public share token (revokes the old link).
operations.template: Rotate the public share token (revokes the old link).

operations.name: ADD_RESPONSE
operations.description: Append a submitted response (only while the survey is OPEN).
operations.template: Append a submitted response (only while the survey is OPEN).

errors.name: SurveyNotOpenError
errors.description: The survey is not currently accepting responses.

errors.name: UnknownQuestionError
errors.description: A submitted answer references a question that does not exist in the survey.

operations.name: DELETE_RESPONSE

errors.name: ResponseNotFoundError
errors.description: The referenced response does not exist.
